productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Navy Blue Shirt
description: Composition Navy blue shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, short sleeves, a buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest, embroidery on the right chest and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water Do not tumble dry Dry in shade inside out Warm iron; do not iron on print and embroidery Up your style with this shirt from flying machine. Created with soft cotton, this piece offers exemplary comfort all day. Team it with classic jeans and casual shoes and accessorise with an understated belt.
